name: SpyFu Competitive SEO & PPC Intelligence API
what_it_does: SpyFu REST API for competitive SEO and PPC intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage competitor keyword and organic ranking data retrieval, handle Google Ads and paid keyword competitive intelligence, access competitor domain traffic and SEO performance data, retrieve competitor backlink profile and domain authority analysis, manage organic vs paid keyword overlap and cannibalization detection, handle SERP ranking history and ranking change tracking, access competitor ad copy and landing page intelligence, retrieve PPC budget and ad spend estimation data, manage keyword difficulty and opportunity scoring, and integrate competitive intelligence with SEO strategy and content marketing platforms.
use_cases: Researching competitor keywords from SEO strategy agents
Monitoring competitor Google Ads from PPC management agents
Benchmarking domain authority from content marketing agents
Integrating competitive data with SEO tools from digital marketing agents
not_for: First-party analytics without competitive benchmarking requirements
Enterprise GRC without competitive digital marketing context
Consumer personal use without marketing or business context
best_when: A digital marketing team using SpyFu wants AI agents to automate competitor keyword research, PPC competitive analysis, organic ranking monitoring, and SEO strategy integration.
avoid_when: ACCURACY LIMITATION: SpyFu competitive data is estimated based on search patterns — actual competitor spend and traffic can differ significantly. Very small or niche sites have limited data accuracy. Automated decisions on marketing budget should treat SpyFu data as directional.

auth.notes: SpyFu uses API key authentication. Per-account key included with subscription. REST API at spyfu.com/api. No native webhooks. Rate limits per plan tier. CSV and JSON response formats. US Google search data primary focus; international data available but less comprehensive.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Limited free lookups; API access requires paid plan ($39+/mo)
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic ($39/mo), Professional ($79/mo), Team ($299/mo); higher tiers include API access
pricing.notes: Scottsdale, Arizona. Founded 2006. Private. Competitive SEO and PPC intelligence market. Strong SMB and agency adoption. US-focused data with international coverage. Known for affordable pricing vs SEMrush. Competes with SEMrush and Ahrefs for competitive SEO intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan tier; daily and monthly request quotas

known_agent_gotchas: ACCURACY LIMITATION: PPC spend estimates are statistical models; actual competitor budgets can differ by 50%+
US-focused data — SpyFu's strongest data is US Google search; international data quality varies
Plan-based API access — API not included in all plans; verify subscription tier includes API access
Daily quotas — API calls have daily limits per plan; high-volume automation requires monitoring quota consumption
No webhooks — batch data collection pattern; implement scheduled jobs rather than event-driven automation
Historical data depth — some endpoints have limited historical depth; verify available history for trend analysis
agent_readiness.security_notes: Competitive SEO data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Competitor keyword and PPC data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Competitive intelligence data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Competitive SEO and PPC data.
